name: AI Call Scheduler
description: Checks Airtable for contacts that need calls scheduled, fetches Google Calendar availability, uses Claude AI to suggest optimal meeting times considering schedules and preferences, and posts the scheduling suggestions to Slack. Adapted from n8n's voice AI receptionist call scheduling workflow.

source.originalName: Automate call scheduling with Voice AI receptionist using Vapi, Google Calendar & Airtable

airtableKey.description: Airtable connection key for fetching contacts

calendarKey.description: Google Calendar connection key for checking availability

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting suggestions

tableName.description: Airtable table name with contacts to schedule

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post scheduling suggestions

steps.name: Fetch contacts from Airtable that need scheduling
Extract contact details from Airtable records
Calculate date range for calendar query
Fetch calendar events for the next week
Build Slack Block Kit scheduling message
